Course Title: AI-Generated Scams in Travel and Hospitality
Category: Hospitality & Tourism: Hotels, Tourism, Travel Agencies, Food & Beverage
Who is this for: Hotel managers, travel agents, tourism operators, restaurant managers, hospitality staff, customer service representatives, front desk agents, reservation staff, booking coordinators
Team or Dept this is for: Hospitality Operations, Customer Service, Reservations, Sales, Marketing, Front Office, Guest Relations
Description: Fake bookings, phishing, and impersonation risks.
Prerequisites: A basic familiarity with everyday internet use and a general awareness of how travel bookings are made online is all that is needed to get started with this course.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, you will be able to identify common AI-generated scams targeting the travel and hospitality sector, including fake bookings, phishing attempts, and impersonation schemes. You will also be able to explain how these threats operate and apply practical strategies to protect your business and customers from falling victim to them.
